Event.title: Road to Kalos

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
Earn 6 points per Mega Evolution toward increasing any Pokémon's Mega Level
Earn up to 6 points daily toward increasing any Pokémon's Mega Level
Increased chance of receiving event-themed 2 km Eggs from spinning PokéStops or Gyms.
Shadow Pokémon can forget the Charged Attack Frustration with a Charged TM.
The Remote Raid Pass limit will be increased to 30 from Monday, February 23 to Friday, February 27, 2026
There will be no limit on Remote Raids from Saturday, February 28, to Sunday, March 1, 2026
Zygarde Cells can appear at the end of up to 5 Routes per day.

Event.description:
We’re en route to Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos, and we can’t forget about an important stop along the way: the Road to Kalos event! Before Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Global begins on February 28, 2026, you’re invited to this week-long “rewind” of previous GO Tour events, which celebrate the Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, and Unova regions!
Plus, early readings are showing that certain Legendary Pokémon, previously featured at each GO Tour event, are getting ready to reappear… Could this be the work of the Mythical Pokémon Hoopa?
Trainers attending the in-person Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos events in Tainan and Los Angeles can jump into the Kalos-inspired fun even sooner! Check out the event site for more details on how to attend. Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Global is a free event available to all Trainers on Saturday, February 28, and Sunday, March 1, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. local time. Learn more about the event and purchase tickets here!

Research.title: Twitch Drops for 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships
Research.description:
Get codes for exclusive Timed Research during the 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships Twitch broadcast.
Pokémon GO Trainers are headed to London for the 2026 Pokémon Europe International Championships to have their skills tested as they battle on the road to crown the 2026 Pokémon World Champion!
You’ll be able to watch exciting Pokémon battles live from London all weekend long, from February 13–15, 2026. Pokémon GO Trainers who tune in to the EUIC livestream on Twitch can also receive Timed Research via Twitch Drops, featuring 15 Seel Candy XL, 20 Fast TMs, 20 Charged TMs, and a Dewgong inspired by NiteTimeClasher’s LAIC-winning team.
You can watch live and learn more about the 2026 Europe International Championships at:
twitch.tv/pokemongo
Find more information on the Timed Research from the Twitch Drops in the Research section.

Research.title: Twitch Drops for 2026 Pokémon North American International Championships
Research.description:
Get codes for exclusive Timed Research and a Battle Bundle during the 2026 Pokémon North American International Championships Twitch broadcast.
When P4T0M4N reached the top at the 2026 Pokémon GO Europe International Championships, he had his faithful Seaking helping him along the way. Watch the 2026 NAIC stream, and you can get one of your own to join your team.
Tune in to Twitch.tv/PokemonGO during NAIC or the Grand Finals on Twitch.tv/Pokemon, and you’ll earn rewards the longer you watch. Here’s what you can get:
Watch for 30 minutes: Unique Timed Research that includes the following.
- An encounter with a Seaking that knows the move Icy Wind
- 20 Goldeen Candy XL
- 10 Charged TMs
- 10 Fast TMs
Watch for 45 minutes: An NAIC Battle Bundle that includes the following.
- 1 Elite Charged TM
- 1 Rare Candy XL
- 25 Charged TMs
- 25 Fast TMs
Both redemptions must be claimed by June 26, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. PDT.
Find more information on the Timed Research from the Twitch Drops in the Research section.

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Memories in Motion!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.

Research Day.title: Replay: Water Research Day
Research Day.description: Make a splash during Replay: Water Research Day! Complete event-themed Field Research tasks to encounter Lotad, Feebas, and Clamperl, with an increased chance of meeting their Shiny counterparts.

Timed Research.title: Choose Your Path Timed Research
Timed Research.description:
Niantic is testing a new branching Timed Research format during “evergreen weeks,” which are weeks without major events where seasonal gameplay takes focus.
This Timed Research lets you choose your own way to play for the week by selecting one of three branches based on exploration, skill, or battling.
Choose wisely! You can select only one path and remain on that path until the end of the Timed Research.
Each path grants a different event bonus and includes different tasks and rewards.

Update.title: Community Day Vote for August
Update.description: We’re bringing back Community Day voting for the final Community Day of the Season! From Saturday, May 30, at 6:00 p.m. PDT to Sunday, May 31, at 6:00 p.m. PDT, you’ll be able to vote for the August Community Day featured Pokémon via the official Pokémon GO YouTube channel. The Pokémon that receives the most votes will be featured on August Community Day on August 16, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. local time.

Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.
